text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of Mejiro Ryan's debut. She's pumped
up and ready to show off the results of all her
training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm soon subsides, though, when she
considers the other runners also making their
debuts, and the complex feelings they're surely
shouldering.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing this, Ines Fujin comes by and offers some
words of support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan, realizing that she has people rooting
for her, regains her composure and heads to the
race.
